required_skills: Broad operational execution across multiple business functions simultaneously
Rapid problem scoping and first-principles solution design in ambiguous environments
Business analysis, market research, and competitive intelligence
Project management and ruthless prioritization under resource constraints
Strong written and verbal communication for internal and external audiences
Data analysis and metrics tracking to inform day-to-day operational decisions
Customer-facing skills including sales outreach, user interviews, and partnership conversations
Comfort with ambiguity and ability to own outcomes without defined playbooks
preferred_skills: Prior founding experience or employee #1-10 experience at an early-stage startup
Technical literacy — ability to work with APIs, no-code tools, and basic scripting
Exposure to fundraising mechanics, pitch deck creation, and investor narrative building
Understanding of product management principles and user-centered design thinking
Experience running growth experiments across paid, organic, or community channels
Familiarity with hiring, onboarding, and building foundational team culture
Domain expertise in a high-growth sector such as SaaS, marketplace, fintech, or consumer
responsibilities: Own a broad portfolio of critical early-stage tasks spanning operations, sales, marketing, product, and finance — context-switching fluidly as company needs evolve
Identify the highest-leverage problem the company faces each week and design a concrete action plan to resolve it within available resources and constraints
Conduct rapid market research, competitor teardowns, and customer discovery interviews to inform product positioning, pricing, and go-to-market decisions
Build and manage foundational operational infrastructure including CRM setup, internal wikis, hiring workflows, and vendor contracts from scratch
Run early-stage sales and business development cycles — sourcing leads, conducting outreach, managing relationships, and closing initial customer or partner contracts
Design and launch lean growth experiments across channels, measuring results rigorously and doubling down on what drives user acquisition and retention
Support the founding team in preparing investor materials including pitch decks, financial models, and data room documentation for seed or Series A fundraising
Manage key external relationships with vendors, agencies, advisors, and community partners, negotiating favorable terms and ensuring delivery quality
Instrument basic analytics and reporting infrastructure so the team has real-time visibility into user behavior, revenue metrics, and operational health
Step into temporary functional ownership roles — acting as interim head of sales, ops, or marketing — until dedicated hires are onboarded and ramped
